addon_description: (¡Ahora somos internacionales!) Find the correct order for your favorite movie franchises and series! 🍿 CineMaratona organizes sagas, thematic marathons, and special events chronologically so you can just hit play.

configure.title: Configurar Addon
configure.install_note: O agrégalo manualmente en Stremio → Addons → Community Addons → Paste URL
